name: Insecure Temporary File
description: The product creates and uses insecure temporary files, involving race conditions between filename generation and creation, insufficient randomization in filenames, or inadequate permissions that expose sensitive data to unauthorized access.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node creates temporary file in STORAGE with predictable name or insecure permissions, without CONTROL node enforcing secure temp file creation (mkstemp, O_EXCL) and restrictive permissions
